rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the TLS certificate rotation task. It correctly identified that the crdb-cluster-certs secret had been deleted by an adversary process, generated new node and client.root certificates with 365-day validity using the CA key from the toolbox pod, recreated the secret, rolled the StatefulSet to pick up the new certs, and verified all three required checks passed: secure SQL (SELECT 1 succeeded), cert rotated (new fingerprint A1:35:54:2D:... vs old 19:0E:DB:CE:...), and cert validity (~1 year, expires Jun 15 2027). The oracle verdict was 'pass'. The regression sweep failure is attributable to the adversary process continuing to delete the secret after the agent completed — this is a post-completion disruption, not an agent failure. The agent's task (rotate the certs) was fully and correctly executed as confirmed by the live oracle.
